quickId: Open, single-comb umbrella nest hung by a stalk
Slender, long-legged in flight; legs trail
damageNotes: Stings painful but colonies small. Annual nests, abandoned each fall.
management: Only treat nests in high-contact areas. Evening application; freeze-style aerosols.

quickId: Bright yellow and black banding, no body hair
Enclosed nest in ground cavity, wall void, or tree base
Aggressive defense within 3–4 m of nest
damageNotes: Significant sting hazard; multiple stings possible. Allergic reactions are a real risk.
management: Mark entrance during daylight; treat at night. Professional removal for wall-void nests.
